title: Curriculum Developer Vacancy at MBD Group Global Group - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Curriculum Developer Vacancy at MBD Group Global Group - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
Join the MBD Group Global Group family as a Curriculum Developer in Indore. We believe in empowering our employees with the tools, training, and environment they need to succeed.

About MBD Group Global Group:
MBD Group Global Group is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Conduct parent-teacher meetings and update parents on student performance
• Participate in teacher training and professional development programs
• Maintain classroom discipline and create a positive learning environment
• Conduct doubt-clearing sessions and remedial classes for weak students
• Collaborate with faculty on curriculum development initiatives
• Participate in school events, workshops, and training programs
• Develop and deliver engaging lesson plans for students

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Any graduate with relevant experience
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in E-learning
• Proficiency in Communication Skills
• Proficiency in Student Assessment
• Proficiency in Bloom's Taxonomy
• Proficiency in IB Curriculum
• Proficiency in Data Analysis
• Proficiency in Research Skills
• Proficiency in LMS Platforms

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Life and accident insurance
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Indore, Madhya Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with MBD Group Global Group!
